purpose: Add Reaction and ReactionThreadKey types, CURATED_EMOJI constant (24 glyphs), and eight emoji-feature i18n keys with en/de values. This story is purely additive — no runtime behaviour changes. It establishes the Seam S1 type contract that every downstream story depends on.

public_api.name: ReactionThreadKey
public_api.signature: type ReactionThreadKey = { kind: 'group'; groupId: string } | { kind: 'dm'; peerPubkeyHex: string }
public_api.description: Discriminated union identifying the persistence namespace for a reaction thread. Exported from app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts.

public_api.name: Reaction
public_api.signature: interface Reaction { id: string; messageId: string; reactorPubkey: string; emoji: string; eventId: string; createdAt: number; removed: boolean }
public_api.description: Row shape stored in idb-keyval. No identity_id field (D11). eventId is empty string for optimistic rows. Exported from app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts.

public_api.name: CURATED_EMOJI
public_api.description: Exactly 24 Unicode glyphs covering Faces, Gestures, Symbols, Objects from spec §1.1. Exported from app/src/lib/reactions/types.ts.

public_api.name: Copy.emoji
public_api.signature: emoji: { openPicker: string; closePicker: string; reactWith: string; insertEmoji: string; removeReaction: string; couldntReact: string; reactors: string; reactionCount: string }
public_api.description: Eight new keys added to the Copy type in app/src/lib/i18n.ts, with en and de values.

owned_data: Reaction interface definition (no runtime data — type only)
emoji.* keys in Copy type and en/de translation objects
dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/i18n.ts (modification — adding emoji.* section to Copy type and both locale objects)
dependencies_forbidden: Any npm package not already in package.json
test_targets: app/tests/unit/reactions/reactions.i18n.test.ts — asserts getCopy('en') and getCopy('de') for all eight emoji.* keys
